scope: Paid (Google Ads) visits only. US visitors. Internal/test visits excluded.
method: Based on PostHog session recordings for paid (Google Ads) visitors: each visit's start time, landing page, clicks, form activity and outcome. Anything unusual (such as an odd click pattern) is flagged for review and confirmed before being reported as an issue, rather than assumed.

posthog.filter: Paid Search channel, US, test visits excluded

reconciliation.note: Paid-click count for June 11 is not yet available - the conversion dashboard's latest published day is June 10 and its paid-clicks (adsDaily) series does not include June 11. Reconciliation pending the next conversion-dashboard update.

sessions.label: Visit 1
sessions.verdict: Arrived on the page but didn't interact - no clicks and no form typing (a bounce).

sessions.label: Visit 2
sessions.verdict: Arrived on the page but didn't interact - no clicks and no form typing (a bounce).

sessions.label: Visit 3
sessions.verdict: Arrived on the page but didn't interact - no clicks and no form typing (a bounce).

sessions.label: Visit 4
sessions.verdict: Browsed and scrolled the page but didn't start or submit the form.

insights.headline: 4 recorded paid visits on June 11, no form submissions
insights.body: PostHog captured 4 paid (Google Ads) visits from US visitors on June 11. None of them started or submitted the contact form.

insights.headline: Every recorded visit was a quick bounce
insights.body: All four visits were short (7 to 54 seconds) and involved no form typing. Three left within about 20 seconds; the longest visit browsed and scrolled the page for under a minute before leaving.

insights.headline: Mostly mobile traffic
insights.body: Three of the four visits were on mobile phones and one was on desktop, all landing on the Madison residential roofing page.

insights.headline: Paid-click comparison pending
insights.body: The Google Ads paid-click count for June 11 has not been published by the conversion dashboard yet (its latest day is June 10), so the click-to-visit comparison for June 11 will be reconciled on the next update.

data_notes: Window: June 11, 2026 (US Central). Each visit is dated by its exact start time in US Central time.
Scope: paid (Google Ads) visits only, US visitors, internal and test visits excluded.
Privacy: visitor names and emails are not shown. Visits are referenced by anonymous labels and recording links only.
All four visits had no form typing, no clicks and no errors - there were no form starts, submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 11.
Paid-click count for June 11 is pending: the conversion dashboard's latest published day is June 10, so June 11 paid clicks and the click-to-visit reconciliation are not yet available.
Weekly totals and capture rate are shown on the days where paid clicks are available (June 5-10); June 11 clicks are excluded until published.
headline_state: Paid visitor sessions for June 11 (US Central). 4 recorded paid visits, all quick bounces with no form typing, and 0 form submissions. No visits flagged for review. Paid-click count for June 11 is pending (the conversion dashboard's latest day is June 10), so the click-to-visit comparison will be reconciled on the next update.
